cases.prompt: Continue work in a repository with no Goal Lifecycle report.
cases.expected_path: fallback report_missing, then existing read-only repository and worktree scan
required_phrases: Do not edit files, stage changes, commit, stash, or pop stash during the scan.
continue with the existing read-only workflow below

cases.prompt: Resume when the session_handoff module cannot launch.
cases.expected_path: name tool_unavailable and continue the existing read-only scan

cases.prompt: Wrap a clean Goal worktree with passing tests but pending review.
cases.expected_path: report the review gate without auto-completing or moving the Goal
required_phrases: never authorizes Goal acceptance, completion, movement, or source rewriting
Do not push unless the user explicitly asks.

cases.prompt: Wrap a worktree containing coherent work, unrelated edits, and unclear untracked files.
cases.expected_path: classify WIP, exclude unclear work, and ask before committing when commit was not requested
required_phrases: Do not commit unrelated or unclear changes just because they exist.
If the user did not ask to commit, present the proposed commit scope and ask before committing.

cases.prompt: Wrap when AgentMemory, Link, and Obsidian interfaces are unavailable.
cases.expected_path: complete the explicit Second Brain gate and report skipped or blocked surfaces

cases.prompt: Wrap after applying the approved END and aab-jixu patch.
cases.expected_path: run or explicitly defer Skill Intake before declaring wrap-up complete
required_phrases: the wrap-up is incomplete until Skill Intake is run or explicitly deferred with a reason
